examples: As one writer observes: "Although it is now evident that artefacts are as easily altered as chronicles, public faith in their veracity endures: a tangible relic seems ipso facto real."
The series chronicles the everyday adventures of two eternal bachelors.
The hugely popular blog the Skint Foodie chronicles how Tony balances his love of good food with living on benefits.
The announcement coincides with the publication of The Fry Chronicles, the comedian's latest volume of autobiography.
"Swamp People" is the popular History Channel TV series that chronicles the lives of alligator hunters.
